mnemonics: ETH = Ethereum Homestead. ETC = Ethereum Classic 'cause they split over a hack. Think of ETH as the 'Home' chain and ETC as the 'Classic' fork that stuck with the original code.
keyPoints: ETH (Ethereum) is the main, continuously developed blockchain after the DAO hard fork.
ETC (Ethereum Classic) is the original chain that continued without reversing The DAO hack transactions.
The key philosophical difference is immutability (ETC) vs. pragmatic intervention (ETH).
commonMistakes: Confusing ETH and ETC, thinking they are the same or interchangeable.
Assuming ETC is the newer or more advanced version, when it is actually the original chain that did not upgrade.
